<?php namespace Spatie\Permission\Commands; use Illuminate\Console\Command; use Spatie\Permission\PermissionRegistrar; class CacheReset extends Command { protected $signature = 'permission:cache-reset'; protected $description = 'Reset the permission cache'; public function handle() { $permissionRegistrar = app(PermissionRegistrar::class); $cacheExists = $permissionRegistrar->getCacheRepository()->has($permissionRegistrar->cacheKey); if ($permissionRegistrar->forgetCachedPermissions()) { $this->info('Permission cache flushed.'); } elseif ($cacheExists) { $this->error('Unable to flush cache.'); } } }
